title: rewrite this text please: Given the ever-increasing growth of digital technologies, what role do IT capabilities play in…

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: rewrite this text please: Given the ever-increasing growth of digital technologies, what role do IT capabilities play in the digital transformation of hospitals based on a resource-based perspective? Specifically, is physical IT infrastructure still a capability or is it playing a role in digital transformation as a resource?

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: In light of the continually expanding field of digital tech, what part do IT abilities have in the digital revolution of hospitals when viewed through a resource-based lens? More specifically, is physical IT infrastructure still considered a capability, or is it now more of a resource in the context of digital transformation?
